sections.title: Using a dark acorn on his Giant Squirrel

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like some help?

lines.speaker: c0lect0r890
lines.text: Urgh, it just happened again! Every time I almost have it my hand slips.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that's unfortunate. Are you using a lockpick?

lines.speaker: c0lect0r890
lines.text: Yes. Well actually, I'm using a Strange old lockpick. I found it while looting one of these coffins and I typically have better luck with it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that's interesting. I'll keep my eyes out for one.

lines.speaker: c0lect0r890
lines.text: I've found a few of them while raiding this place. There appear to be more of them on this floor than the floors above.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. If you don't mind me asking, you already have dark graceful so why are you still looking for hallowed marks?

lines.speaker: c0lect0r890
lines.text: Oh, it's because of this little fellow following me. I've heard that the Dark acorn sold by the guy upstairs will transform him into a Dark Squirrel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, I didn't know that! That sounds pretty cool.

lines.speaker: c0lect0r890
lines.text: Yeah, that's what I thought but that mysterious stranger is asking for 3,000 Hallowed marks for it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 3,000? That sounds extortionate!

lines.speaker: c0lect0r890
lines.text: Yeah, that's what I thought. Feels like he set the price just to keep me down here for longer. Still, it's not like I have anything better to do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see, well best of luck. Hopefully you survive long enough to finish your goal.

lines.speaker: c0lect0r890
lines.text: I'm sure I'll be fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, I ended up buying one myself and fed it to my Giant Squirrel. It took a while but it was definitely worth it.

lines.speaker: c0lect0r890
lines.text: Wow, I'm impressed! How long did it take you to get the 3,000 marks?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Long enough... Still, at least I feel much more agile now than when I started.

lines.speaker: c0lect0r890
lines.text: I don't think I'm going to get any more agile while looking for it myself. I'm glad you received some benefit from the grind though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see, well best of luck. Hopefully you survive long enough to finish your goal.

lines.speaker: c0lect0r890
lines.text: I'm sure I'll be fine.

sections.title: When attempting to open a coffin

lines.speaker: c0lect0r890
lines.text: C'mon, almost got it...

lines.speaker: c0lect0r890
lines.text: Agh, thought I had it that time!
